news.headline: Global leader in AI, The Digital Neighborhood, receives 4 prestigious Microsoft Partner of the Year awards in Redmond, WA - June 27, 2024.
news.summary: In Amsterdam on June 27, 2024, The Digital Neighborhood, a network of European tech firms focused on Microsoft AI and Cloud services, was recognized with four esteemed Microsoft Partner of the Year awards during an event in Redmond, WA. The achievement underscores the success and expertise of the community in the industry.

news.headline: Wall Street facing weak opening as tech rally falters with Micron, Nvidia dipping. Futures down in premarket trading.
news.summary: The broader market's two-day rally might stall as traders remain cautious ahead of upcoming economic catalysts. Micron Technology's negative earnings reaction could impact the tech sector, while Nvidia's rally is cooling off. Bond yields have risen, with the 10-year Treasury yield above 4.3%. Traders await the presidential debate and the Federal Reserve's inflation gauge. Futures performance shows a slight decline: Nasdaq 100 -0.12%, S&P 500 -0.11%, Dow -0.16%, R2K -0.12%. In premarket trading, SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ ETF both saw slight decreases. Stock markets closed higher on Wednesday, with tech strength supporting the Nasdaq, while consumer discretionary stocks were strong. New home sales were weaker than expected, but previous readings were revised upwards. IT and communications stocks rose modestly. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Brighton Park Capital invests $112 million in PortSwigger for innovation and growth in software development.
news.summary: Investment firm Brighton Park Capital has recently disclosed an $112 million investment in PortSwigger, a distinguished application security software provider. This investment is aimed at supporting the growth of PortSwigger, which operates within the software, healthcare, and tech-enabled services industries. This substantial investment is the first external funding PortSwigger has received, signifying a pivotal moment for the company as it looks to expedite product development and expansion.

news.headline: New Worldcoin rival, RariMe, uses ZK Proofs to ensure anonymity. Claims to verify identity/age without scanning eyes.
news.summary: RariMe, a company in the same industry as Worldcoin, asserts similar statements but differentiates itself by claiming to authenticate your identity and age without the need for an eye scan.

news.headline: Kootenay Silver Inc. has started drilling at Columba Project in Mexico with second drill, focusing on extending "D-Vein".
news.summary: VANCOUVER, BC - On June 27, 2024, Kootenay Silver Inc. disclosed that coring activities have commenced at the Columba Project in Chihuahua state, Mexico, with a second drill operational. The Company, trading as KTN on the TSXV, aims to expand the boundaries of the "D-Vein" mineralization through their ongoing efforts.

news.headline: Karen Petrou to become Board Chair of Foundation Fighting Blindness, effective July 1, 2024, following David Brint's retirement after 8 years of service.
news.summary: After serving for eight years, David Brint has retired from his position. Starting on July 1, 2024, Petrou will take over the leadership role. The Foundation Fighting Blindness, known for its work in advancing treatments and cures for blinding diseases worldwide, revealed this change. The announcement was made in Columbia, Maryland, on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: AI solution by CorrActions analyzes brain activity in drivers to prevent cognitive distraction, drowsiness, alcohol; could save 20,000 lives/year.
news.summary: An Israeli company called CorrActions is utilizing AI technology to monitor drivers' brain activity and identify signs of cognitive distraction, drowsiness, and alcohol impairment. This innovative solution aims to enhance road safety by potentially preventing over 20,000 fatalities annually. The company's headquarters are located in Tel Aviv, Israel.

news.headline: HFSA offering in-person review course for heart failure physicians pursuing board certification in 2024.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Washington, the Heart Failure Society of America (HFSA) was highlighted as a prominent organization offering valuable educational and professional growth opportunities for healthcare providers managing patients with heart failure across the United States. The HFSA stands out as a key player in equipping clinicians with necessary skills to manage heart failure cases effectively. They are actively assisting clinicians in the application process for initial certifications.

news.headline: Elevation Oncology to combine EO-3021 with ramucirumab and dostarlimab, start Phase 1 trial in 2024, entering supply agreements.
news.summary: A plan is underway to assess EO-3021 alongside ramucirumab and dostarlimab, with clinical supply agreements made with Lilly and GSK for this purpose. Dosing for the combination segment of the Phase 1 trial is set to commence by the end of 2024. The introduction of combination groups is expected to expand the market reach of the trial significantly.

news.headline: Agnico Eagle Mines (AEM) to release Q2 2024 results on July 31, after hours. Stock Symbol: AEM (NYSE and TSX).
news.summary: Agnico Eagle Mines Limited (NYSE: AEM) (TSX: AEM) has revealed that it will be sharing its Q2 2024 financial results on July 31, 2024, after regular trading hours. The announcement was made today in Toronto. AEM is a prominent player in the mining sector, traded on both the NYSE and TSX under the ticker symbol AEM. Investors and analysts are eagerly anticipating the release of these results for insights into the company's performance during this period.

news.headline: Cheche Group partners with BAIC Group's insurance provider, Beijing Anpeng Insurance Broker Co., Ltd. on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Beijing, Cheche Group Inc. (NASDAQ: CCG), a prominent auto insurance technology platform in China, disclosed a significant collaboration with Beijing Anpeng Insurance Broker Co., Ltd. The partnership aims to enhance services and offerings provided by both companies.

news.headline: Berkshire Hills to reveal Q2 2024 earnings on July 18 at 7:30am (Eastern) and host conference call at 9:00am.
news.summary: The Berkshire Hills Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE: BHLB) has announced its upcoming earnings release and conference call for the second quarter of 2024. The earnings release is scheduled for July 18, 2024, at around 7:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The conference call will take place on the same day, Thursday, July 18, 2024, starting at 9:00 a.m. (Eastern). Investors and stakeholders can look forward to the financial updates and discussions during this event.

news.headline: SolarEdge appoints Shuki Nir as new CMO. Nir led roles at SanDisk, named General Manager of Consumer Business Unit.
news.summary: SolarEdge Technologies, Inc., a leading company in smart energy technology, has named Mr. Shuki Nir as its new Chief Marketing Officer (CMO). With a background that includes roles such as General Manager of the Consumer Business Unit at SanDisk, Mr. Nir brings valuable experience to his new position. SolarEdge, listed on Nasdaq as SEDG, continues to strengthen its leadership team with this appointment.

news.headline: MW Storage and Fluence partner for third energy storage project in Finland, a 20MW/20MWh system near Mäntsälä.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, MW Storage AG, a Swiss investment fund specializing in energy storage systems, has chosen Fluence Energy B.V. to implement their third battery-based energy storage project in Finland. This project, with a capacity of 20 MW and 20 MWh, will be situated near Mäntsälä in Uusimaa, in southern Finland. Fluence Energy B.V. is a subsidiary of Fluence Energy, Inc., listed on NASDAQ as FLNC.

news.headline: Dios Exploration begins exploration work on 5 James Bay properties in Quebec. TSX-V: DOS. Follow-up field work includes LeCaron, Lithium-Nord, East-Clarkie, Nemiscau-Nord, and Pontax-Nord.
news.summary: In Montreal on June 27, 2024, Dios Exploration ("Dios") has commenced follow-up fieldwork on its wholly-owned properties in the James Bay Lower Eastmain greenstone belt. These properties include LeCaron, Lithium-Nord, East-Clarkie, Nemiscau-Nord, and Pontax-Nord. Dios is listed on the TSX-V under the symbol DOS. The fieldwork is part of the planned exploration activities on these properties.

news.headline: Cronos' Spinach® brand expands cannabis products with new flavors for summer; includes SOURZ edibles and milled flower.
news.summary: In Toronto on June 27, 2024, Cronos Group Inc. (NASDAQ: CRON) (TSX: CRON) announced the expansion of its Spinach® brand's lineup of popular cannabis products for the summer season. The brand, known for its award-winning offerings, will introduce new flavors and formats under its SOURZ by Spinach® edibles line, along with a high-quality milled flower product. This expansion aims to capitalize on summer demand, enhancing the company's product portfolio to meet consumer preferences.

news.headline: Exploration confirms high TiO2 grades in ilmenite boulders in Foothills project, covering 285 km2 area in Quebec.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Montréal, NioBay Metals Inc. (TSX-V: NBY) (OTCQB: NBYCF) announced promising findings from exploration at the Foothills project. Assay results have revealed significant TiO2 grades in massive ilmenite boulders. Situated north of Saint-Urbain, the project is located 100 km north of Quebec City and 90 km south of Saguenay (La Baie region) in Quebec. Spanning approximately 285 km2, the project consists of five distinct claim blocks and encompasses much of the Saint-Urbain anorthosite's contact zone.

news.headline: Vivos sees success in new model: 8/10 OS patients opt for oral appliance therapy 5:1 over traditional devices.
news.summary: In a recent study, it was found that 80% of newly diagnosed patients with obstructive sleep apnea (OSA) opt for oral appliance therapy as opposed to continuous positive airway pressure (CPAP) treatment. Out of those choosing oral appliances, 8 out of 10 patients preferred Vivos' flagship CARE oral medical devices over traditional oral appliances. This indicates a significant preference for Vivos' products, with a ratio of 5 to 1 in comparison to conventional oral appliances among OSA patients.

news.headline: Venus Concept celebrates successful NEXThetics events in North America, hosting thousands of registrants, including its largest gathering in Houston with increased popularity and attendance. (Characters: 120)
news.summary: Venus Concept Inc. (NASDAQ: VERO), a prominent global medical aesthetic technology company, has recently wrapped up its NEXThetics events in various key cities in North America. These events serve as a platform for aesthetic leaders and practitioners within the Venus Concept network to convene and collaborate. The NEXThetics events have experienced a notable surge in interest and participation, with thousands of registrants attending since the pilot events. The largest gathering thus far took place in Houston, Texas on June 22, 2024, marking a significant milestone for the company.

news.headline: FTI Consulting appoints Maarten Derksen as Senior Managing Director in Transactions practice, effective June 27, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on June 27, 2024, FTI Consulting, Inc. disclosed the appointment of Maarten Derksen to the role of Senior Managing Director in the global Transactions practice under the Corporate Finance & Restructuring segment. Derksen will be joining the firm to bring his expertise to this key position. FTI Consulting, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol FCN, and this strategic appointment aims to enhance their capabilities in the Transactions practice.

news.headline: Pivotree unveils new upgrades to improve order management and eCommerce efficiency.
news.summary: According to recent reports, a total of 1,200 individuals were affected by the recent outbreak of a mysterious illness in a small town. Out of these cases, 500 have been confirmed as positive for the unknown virus. Medical authorities have taken necessary measures to contain the spread of the illness, with 300 individuals currently receiving medical treatment in local hospitals. The remaining 200 individuals are under quarantine as a precautionary measure. Investigations are ongoing to determine the cause of the outbreak and proper protocols are being followed to ensure the safety of the public.

news.headline: Founder Toshiuki Otsuka disagrees with reports on NFT demise, believes NFTs are "evolving." #Crypto #NFTs
news.summary: The creator of a snap-to-earn platform, Toshiuki Otsuka, vehemently disagreed with the prevailing viewpoint and contended that NFTs are undergoing a transformation.

news.headline: Discover the latest in NFT royalties: including staking and right of reclaim, proposed by a16z crypto. #innovation #NFT
news.summary: Discover the cutting-edge strategies and obstacles regarding NFT royalties such as staking and right of reclaim outlined by a16z crypto. Delve into the details to understand the proposed mechanisms designed to address these challenges. Explore the intricate world of NFTs and the novel solutions being introduced by a16z crypto to navigate this evolving landscape.

news.headline: Arch Biopartners completes GMP manufacturing of cilastatin drug product with Dalton Pharma Services.
news.summary: Arch Biopartners Inc. revealed that Dalton Pharma Services has finished the GMP glass vial filling phase for cilastatin, the company's new drug candidate aimed at averting acute kidney injury. The news was announced on June 27, 2024, without specifying the source. Arch, identified as "Arch" on the market (TSX Venture: ARCH and OTCQB: ACHFF), shared the development regarding their second drug candidate intended for AKI prevention.

news.headline: Cybersecurity firm Socura debuts Rapid Recovery Service for post-breach support, targeting digital forensics partners.
news.summary: A UK-based cyber security managed SOC/MDR specialist, Socura, has introduced its Rapid Recovery Service in CARDIFF, Wales on June 27, 2024. This post-breach SOC service is targeted at digital forensics and incident response partners. The service aims to provide quick and effective assistance following a security breach.

news.headline: BoJ seeks input from market on tapering pace, amount, and framework. #marketcontact #taperingviews
GDS Holdings held its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders on June 27, 2024 in Shanghai. All resolutions presented were approved. (Tweetable)
news.summary: In Shanghai, China, on June 27, 2024, GDS Holdings Limited, a prominent developer and operator of high-performance data centers in China and Southeast Asia, disclosed the successful completion of its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders for 2024. The company, listed on NASDAQ as GDS and on HKEX as 9698, confirmed that all resolutions presented to shareholders during the meeting received approval.

news.headline: Howard Hughes Holdings Inc. buys Waterway Plaza II office building in The Woodlands, Texas, a Class A structure in Town Center.
news.summary: Today, Howard Hughes Holdings Inc. revealed their purchase of Waterway Plaza II, a top-tier office building located in The Woodlands Town Center. This transaction adds another prestigious property to their portfolio, showcasing a strategic business move.

news.headline: Micron stock fell post earnings, while Tesla and Amazon surge into buy zones. Indexes rose slightly.
news.summary: Micron experienced a significant decrease in stock value on Thursday after releasing its earnings report. Conversely, Tesla and Amazon saw growth on Wednesday, leading to a rise in the major indexes. Dow Jones Futures report that Micron fell due to earnings performance, while Tesla and Amazon broke out and entered buy zones. This marked a positive trend in the market, with slight increases observed in the major indexes.

news.headline: Ryuichi Sakamoto transformed music by blending tech and emotion, embodying "Ars longa, vita brevis."
news.summary: Sakamoto embodied the saying "Art takes time, life is short." Renowned for blending technology and emotion in his music, his impact has been significant.

news.headline: Galaxy Research forecasts Ethereum ETFs to attract 20-50% of net inflows of BTC ETFs, implying $1 billion/month influx. SEC approved, path cleared.
news.summary: The Ethereum spot exchange-traded funds (ETFs) in the United States are expected to attract significant investment, as per a report by Galaxy Research. Analyst Charles Yu predicts that net inflows into ETH ETFs could be 20-50% of those into BTC ETFs in the first five months, with a 30% target, amounting to around $1 billion per month. This indicates a strong interest in Ethereum ETFs among U.S. investors. The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) recently approved applicant filings, paving the way for Ethereum ETF trading. The development suggests a potential transformation in the Ethereum ecosystem with the arrival of these financial products.

news.headline: Solana-based meme coin Doraemon soared to $2.4B market cap in 24 hours then plummeted over 99% due to apparent insider trading.
news.summary: A meme coin named Doraemon (CRYPTO: DORAE) launched on Solana experienced a rapid surge to $2.4 billion in market cap in 24 hours. However, a significant downturn followed when an individual sold 2.5 million DORAE tokens for 10,538 Solana (CRYPTO: SOL), valued at $1.45 million. This transaction led to a drastic over 99% drop in the coin's value due to suspected insider trading. Reports indicate that the seller, potentially the token's developer, sparked this major sell-off. For further details, visit Benzinga.com for the complete coverage of the Doraemon ($DORAE) rug incident.

news.headline: Crown Labs, Biojuve mark World Microbiome Day 2024. Skin microbiome's importance in health emphasized.
news.summary: Exploring the potential of the skin microbiome, BIOJUVE unveils groundbreaking findings in Johnson City, Tennessee on June 27, 2024. Recent microbiome studies have transformed how we perceive human health, emphasizing the crucial function of the body's microbiome in promoting overall wellness. This initiative coincides with World Microbiome Day, aiming to raise awareness about microbiome benefits.

news.headline: Roers Companies selects Funnel's Renter-Centric® CRM and AI solution for 8,446-unit portfolio to enhance operations.
news.summary: Funnel Leasing has been chosen by Roers Companies to provide its Renter-Centric® CRM and AI solution for an 8,446-unit portfolio. This announcement comes as Funnel continues to be the preferred front office product suite for top companies, streamlining operations. The decision was made public on June 27, 2024, in Tampa, Florida.

news.headline: ADC Therapeutics to join Russell 2000® and Russell 3000® Indexes on July 1, 2024; listed on NYSE as ADCT.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, ADC Therapeutics SA revealed its inclusion in the Russell 2000® Index and the Russell 3000® Index following the 2024 Russell US Indexes annual reconstitution. This change will be effective from July 1, 2024, marking the Company's entry into the broad-market indices. ADC Therapeutics SA trades on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ADCT. The adjustment will occur at the commencement of US equity markets next week.

news.headline: Data privacy bill may harm small businesses, costing millions. 2,000 small businesses worry about anti-advertising provisions.
news.summary: The American Privacy Rights Act, scheduled for implementation on June 27, 2024, is expected to have significant implications for millions of individuals. A prominent concern is the impact it will have on small businesses, with Internet for Growth, a group representing over 2,000 such enterprises reliant on digital advertising, voicing apprehensions. They fear that the anti-advertising clauses within the Act may lead to increased expenses and inconvenience for both businesses and consumers. This development underscores the potential for far-reaching consequences for the digital advertising industry, highlighting the need for stakeholders to assess and adapt to the impending changes.

news.headline: Stock of Walgreens Boots Alliance drops 2.8% due to profit miss and lowered guidance.
Gilat secures over $14M in orders to expand into the IFC market, gaining orders from new partnerships and existing customers.
news.summary: New partnerships and existing customers have recently resulted in a surge of orders for IFC Solution, with a significant increase in demand. The company has secured a total of [number] new orders from various partners, as well as [number] orders from long-standing customers. This increase in orders is a promising sign of growth for IFC Solution and reflects the trust and satisfaction of their expanding client base.

news.headline: New Jersey Resources pledges $500,000 for Scudder Preserve restoration in Monmouth County to support environmental stewardship.
news.summary: In WALL, N.J., New Jersey Resources (NYSE: NJR) has pledged $500,000 over five years to Monmouth Conservation Foundation (MCF) as part of their Coastal Climate Initiative (CCI). This funding from NJR aims to support the restoration and enhancement of the Scudder Preserve, a significant natural habitat in Middletown, Monmouth County, New Jersey. The initiative reflects NJR's dedication to environmental sustainability and community resilience.

news.headline: Tradewind Finance honors SME customers on MSME Day, thanking thousands for using their capital to grow.
news.summary: In MÖNCHENGLADBACH, Germany, as of June 27, 2024, Tradewind Finance, a leading global trade finance provider, is marking MSME Day by honoring the numerous SME clients it has supported throughout the years, helping them access essential funding to expand and succeed. Recognized as the foundation of economies, micro, small, and medium-sized enterprises have greatly benefited from the services provided by Tradewind Finance, with thousands of SMEs having received financial assistance.

news.headline: Elucid relocates to new HQ as they gear up for commercial launch, marking a milestone in their growth.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the country's unemployment rate has decreased to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in five years. The data shows that the number of unemployed individuals has dropped by 200,000, bringing the total to 1.8 million. Additionally, the report highlights a significant increase in job creation, with a total of 500,000 new jobs added in the past year. This positive trend is attributed to various economic factors and government initiatives aimed at boosting employment. The report also indicates a growth in wages and a reduction in underemployment rates, signaling a strong and improving labor market outlook for the country.

news.headline: Advyzon's annual study "What’s Going On With Assets in 2024?" analyzes trends in financial advisor investing for over 1,500 firms.
news.summary: A recent report titled "What’s Going On With Assets in 2024?” by Advyzon, a service and technology platform for financial advisors, presents insights into new trends in client fund investment. The study, Advyzon’s third annual asset allocation analysis, delves into the changes in asset allocation strategies. Analyzing data from over 1,500 advisory firms utilizing Advyzon for portfolio management, the report examines the evolving landscape of investment practices.

news.headline: EDITED™ launches AI summary feature powered by GenAI to instantly convert dashboards into insights on myEDITED™ platform.
news.summary: In both New York and London, EDITED has introduced a new AI summary feature, leveraging GenAI technology to convert dashboards into insights with unprecedented speed.

news.headline: Sui Blockchain founders exhibit expertise handling pressure driving high-speed laps at Red Bull Racing Simulator.
news.summary: The creators of Sui blockchain demonstrated their technical prowess by responding to questions while driving at high speeds during the Sui Basecamp event. This showcased their expertise and ability to perform under pressure, captivating the audience with their skills. It was a unique and impressive display of their knowledge and composure, leaving a lasting impression on attendees.

news.headline: Galaxy Research predicts Ethereum ETF's inflows to be 20-50% of Bitcoin ETF's inflows, aiming for 30%, amounting to $1 billion/month. SEC approved filings for Ethereum ETF trading in the US.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency market is gearing up for potential growth with the impending launch of Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) spot exchange-traded funds (ETFs) in the United States. A report by Galaxy Research indicates that these new financial products could attract significant investment, potentially reshaping the Ethereum ecosystem. Galaxy analyst Charles Yu predicts that the net inflows into ETH ETFs could range from 20-50% of BTC ETF inflows in the first five months, with a target of 30%, amounting to around $1 billion per month. This projection highlights the considerable interest expected in Ethereum ETFs among U.S. investors. The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) approved applicant filings last month, clearing the path for Ethereum ETF trading. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Tilray Beverages introduces Runner's High Brewing Company, a premium non-alcoholic brand for beer enthusiasts seeking flavor without alcohol.
news.summary: Tilray Beverages has unveiled Runner’s High Brewing Company, a fresh non-alcoholic brand tailored for beer enthusiasts seeking exceptional taste minus the effects.

news.headline: Clearside Biomedical to hold virtual event discussing Suprachoroidal Drug Delivery, focusing on use and versatility.
Lantheus acquires rights to novel GRPR-targeting pair for prostate and breast cancers, expanding portfolio and pipeline.
news.summary: The recent agreement significantly bolsters Lantheus' prostate cancer portfolio and broadens its pipeline to encompass breast cancer. This move marks a pivotal step for the company, enhancing its offerings in the oncology space. The deal involves a significant investment, totaling $X, reinforcing Lantheus' commitment to expanding its presence in the cancer therapeutics market. This strategic decision is expected to drive growth and diversification in Lantheus' product portfolio, ultimately benefitting patients and stakeholders alike.

news.headline: OraSure Technologies backs National HIV Testing Day on June 27, 2024, to promote HIV tests for thousands of people.
news.summary: Bethlehem, Pennsylvania - On June 27, 2024, OraSure Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: OSUR) disclosed its backing for HIV testing campaigns nationwide on National HIV Testing Day. This event is annually observed on June 27th. The company, known for its point-of-care and home diagnostic tests as well as sample management solutions, aims to bolster the efforts to promote HIV testing. By supporting these initiatives, OraSure Technologies anticipates motivating numerous individuals in the United States to undergo HIV testing, contributing to a widespread testing drive.

news.headline: Xtract One Technologies chosen by Florida Panthers to secure entrances at key venues, including Amerant Bank Arena.
news.summary: Xtract One, a security solutions provider, has been chosen by the NHL's Stanley Cup winning Florida Panthers to enhance security at various locations, including Amerant Bank Arena and Baptist Health IcePlex. The FTL War Memorial is also included in this selection. The decision signifies the Panthers' commitment to ensuring the safety and security of visitors.
